title: Evaluation of Canada’s Membership in the International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance - Canada.ca
content:
## Evaluation of Canada’s Membership in the International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance

## Appendix C: Evaluation matrix
- Is there a continued need for Canada to belong to the IHRA? Indicators Trends in level of awareness of the Holocaust and levels of anti-Semitism, racism and xenophobia in Canada and internationally Perceptions of stakeholders regarding continued need for Canada to belong to the IHRA Methodology Literature review Interviews
- Indicators Trends in level of awareness of the Holocaust and levels of anti-Semitism, racism and xenophobia in Canada and internationally Perceptions of stakeholders regarding continued need for Canada to belong to the IHRA
- Trends in level of awareness of the Holocaust and levels of anti-Semitism, racism and xenophobia in Canada and internationally
- Perceptions of stakeholders regarding continued need for Canada to belong to the IHRA
- Methodology Literature review Interviews
- Is membership in the IHRA aligned with departmental and government-wide priorities? Indicators Alignment between objectives of membership in the IHRA and departmental and government-wide priorities Perceptions of stakeholders regarding alignment between membership objectives and departmental and government-wide priorities Methodology Document review Interviews
- Indicators Alignment between objectives of membership in the IHRA and departmental and government-wide priorities Perceptions of stakeholders regarding alignment between membership objectives and departmental and government-wide priorities
- Alignment between objectives of membership in the IHRA and departmental and government-wide priorities
- Perceptions of stakeholders regarding alignment between membership objectives and departmental and government-wide priorities
- Methodology Document review Interviews
- To what extent is membership in the IHRA aligned with federal roles and responsibilities? Indicators Alignment between Canada's IHRA activities and federal mandates and obligations Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding the alignment and appropriateness of CIC and GoC IHRA activities Methodology Document review Interviews
- Indicators Alignment between Canada's IHRA activities and federal mandates and obligations Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding the alignment and appropriateness of CIC and GoC IHRA activities
- Alignment between Canada's IHRA activities and federal mandates and obligations
- Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding the alignment and appropriateness of CIC and GoC IHRA activities
- Methodology Document review Interviews
- How has Canada's membership in the IHRA affected Holocaust education, remembrance and research in Canada? Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the impact of Canada's membership on activities in Canada Extent to which activities/funding related to Holocaust education, remembrance & research within Canada have changed (e.g. increased, decreased, focus) since joining IHRA Methodology Interviews #, type, value of activities supported by Canada since joining IHRA
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the impact of Canada's membership on activities in Canada Extent to which activities/funding related to Holocaust education, remembrance & research within Canada have changed (e.g. increased, decreased, focus) since joining IHRA
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding the impact of Canada's membership on activities in Canada
- Extent to which activities/funding related to Holocaust education, remembrance & research within Canada have changed (e.g. increased, decreased, focus) since joining IHRA
- Methodology Interviews #, type, value of activities supported by Canada since joining IHRA
- #, type, value of activities supported by Canada since joining IHRA
- Has awareness and understanding of the Holocaust and its causes and consequences improved in Canada? (Immediate Outcome) Indicators Trends in level of awareness and understanding of the Holocaust in Canada Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding levels of awareness and understanding of the Holocaust and its causes and consequences in Canada Number and nature of awareness and education activities in Canada related to IHRA membership Methodology Document Review (IHRA plans and reports) Literature review Interviews
- Indicators Trends in level of awareness and understanding of the Holocaust in Canada Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding levels of awareness and understanding of the Holocaust and its causes and consequences in Canada Number and nature of awareness and education activities in Canada related to IHRA membership
- Trends in level of awareness and understanding of the Holocaust in Canada
- Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding levels of awareness and understanding of the Holocaust and its causes and consequences in Canada
- Number and nature of awareness and education activities in Canada related to IHRA membership
- Methodology Document Review (IHRA plans and reports) Literature review Interviews
- Document Review (IHRA plans and reports)
- To what extent did Canada meet its objectives for its Chair year? Internationally? Within Canada? Indicators Comparison of plan to achievements Methodology Document review Interviews
- Indicators Comparison of plan to achievements
- Comparison of plan to achievements
- Methodology Document review Interviews
- How has Canada contributed to the IHRA? Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding Canada's contribution to the IHRA Role of Canadian experts in IHRA Committees or WGs Canada's role in improving IHRA effectiveness Methodology Interviews Document review (IHRA plans and reports)
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding Canada's contribution to the IHRA Role of Canadian experts in IHRA Committees or WGs Canada's role in improving IHRA effectiveness
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding Canada's contribution to the IHRA
- Role of Canadian experts in IHRA Committees or WGs
- Canada's role in improving IHRA effectiveness
- Methodology Interviews Document review (IHRA plans and reports)
- Document review (IHRA plans and reports)
- How has Canada’s approach to building an integrated and socially cohesive society been conveyed internationally through the IHRA? Has it influenced the IHRA? (Immediate Outcome) Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the influence of Canada's approach to building an integrated and socially cohesive society Extent to which Canadian approaches were raised/discussed at IHRA meetings Methodology Interviews Document review (IHRA plans and reports)
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the influence of Canada's approach to building an integrated and socially cohesive society Extent to which Canadian approaches were raised/discussed at IHRA meetings
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding the influence of Canada's approach to building an integrated and socially cohesive society
- Extent to which Canadian approaches were raised/discussed at IHRA meetings
- Methodology Interviews Document review (IHRA plans and reports)
- Document review (IHRA plans and reports)
- To what extent has Canada’s membership in IHRA helped demonstrate Canada’s leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research in Canada and internationally? (Intermediate Outcome) Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding Canada's leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research internationally Perception of key stakeholders regarding the government's leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research within Canada Methodology Interviews
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding Canada's leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research internationally Perception of key stakeholders regarding the government's leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research within Canada
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding Canada's leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research internationally
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding the government's leadership in Holocaust education, remembrance and research within Canada
- Methodology Interviews
- Has Canada’s membership in the IHRA had any unintended consequences (positive or negative)? Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the impact of Canada’s membership on activities in Canada Methodology Interviews
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the impact of Canada’s membership on activities in Canada
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding the impact of Canada’s membership on activities in Canada
- Methodology Interviews

### Resource Utilization
- Could Canada contribute to the IHRA more effectively/efficiently? Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the effectiveness/efficiency of Canada’s contribution to the IHRA Methodology Interviews
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders regarding the effectiveness/efficiency of Canada’s contribution to the IHRA
- Perception of key stakeholders regarding the effectiveness/efficiency of Canada’s contribution to the IHRA
- Methodology Interviews
- Are there alternative ways in which Canada could participate in and support Holocaust education, remembrance and research? Indicators Perception of key stakeholders on more effective/efficient ways of achieving intended outcomes Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding the effectiveness/efficiency of alternative international fora in achieving intended outcomes Similarity of mandates and activities of other international fora Methodology Interviews Document review
- Indicators Perception of key stakeholders on more effective/efficient ways of achieving intended outcomes Perceptions of key stakeholders regarding the effectiveness/efficiency of alternative international fora in achieving intended outcomes Similarity of mandates and activities of other international fora
- Perception of key stakeholders on more effective/efficient ways of achieving intended outcomes
